name: Capstone Term I
description: First term capstone project where students apply Semester 1 skills to build a focused AI solution as a team.
raw_content:
## Overview
Students work in teams to design and build an AI-powered application using skills learned across Semester 1 courses. The capstone emphasizes teamwork, project management, and delivering a working proof of concept.

## Topics
- Project planning and scoping
- Team collaboration
- AI solution design
- Proof of concept development
- Presentation and documentation

## Tools
- Python
- GitHub
- Jupyter Notebooks

## Projects
- Team AI proof of concept project
